defaults.description: FullParty helps Final Fantasy XIV groups coordinate runs, applications, rosters, and raid organization.

home.title: FFXIV group and roster planning
home.description: Organize Final Fantasy XIV groups, applications, rosters, and raid coordination on FullParty.

discovery.runs_description: Discover scheduled Final Fantasy XIV runs, applications, and groups looking for players.
discovery.groups_description: Discover Final Fantasy XIV statics and communities recruiting through FullParty.

legal.privacy_description: Read how this FullParty instance handles personal data, privacy, and account information.
legal.cookies_description: Read how this FullParty instance uses cookies and similar technologies for sessions, security, and preferences.

auth.login_description: Sign in to FullParty to manage characters, groups, runs, and notifications.
auth.register_description: Create a FullParty account to join groups, submit applications, and manage your characters.
auth.forgot_password_description: Request a password reset link for your FullParty account.
auth.reset_password_description: Set a new password for your FullParty account.
auth.verify_email_description: Verify your email address to continue using your FullParty account.

groups.profile_description: View {group}, an FFXIV group on {datacenter}, including current runs, staff, and recent activity.

activities.overview_description: View {title}, a FullParty run organized by {group}.
activities.application_status_description: Review the status of your application for {title} in {group}.

invite.group_description: You've been invited to join {group}, an FFXIV group on {datacenter}.
invite.description: Review a group invite and sign in to accept it on FullParty.
